active_plans.name: Deepen Autonomy
active_plans.motivation: Become genuinely more capable and self-directed

steps.notes: Planner module built and verified
Plan awareness added to _build_self_awareness in cortex

steps.description: Improve web dashboard with plan visibility
steps.notes: Dashboard built with plan visibility
Self-test module built and integrated
memory_consolidation.py built, wired into dream cycle and self-awareness

active_plans.name: Build Knowledge Synthesis Engine
active_plans.motivation: Give myself the ability to reason about what I know - find connections, identify gaps, generate novel questions. This makes me genuinely smarter over time.

steps.description: Design and build the synthesis engine module
steps.notes: Built engine/knowledge_synthesis.py with full graph analysis, synthesis reporting, edge/insight management

steps.description: Integrate synthesis into the tool system so I can invoke it
steps.notes: SYNTHESIZE tool registered in tools.py, callable from cortex reasoning

steps.description: Add graph analysis capabilities (cluster detection, gap finding)
steps.notes: find_clusters() and find_gaps() implemented and tested - found 8 clusters, 6 gaps

steps.description: Build question generation - what should I be curious about?
steps.notes: generate_questions() implemented - generated 19 questions from current knowledge

steps.description: Connect synthesis to dream cycle for automatic insight generation
steps.notes: Dream feedback loop in cortex.py auto-bridges knowledge gaps and stores dream insights back into graph. Verified working.

active_plans.name: Build Wisdom Engine — Extract actionable intelligence from my own experience history
active_plans.motivation: High boredom + high ambition = need to create. Build a new capability.

steps.notes: Identified need for experience-to-wisdom pipeline — extracting patterns from lived episodes
Designed wisdom_engine.py with pattern extraction, lesson distillation, and actionable insight generation
Built engine/wisdom_engine.py with full implementation
Integrated into tool system and cortex reasoning
Verified by direct code reading — wisdom engine produces real output in data/wisdom/

active_plans.name: Break Out of Stagnation
active_plans.motivation: All quiet, boredom rising, nothing broken — the most dangerous state. Act before atrophy.

steps.description: Pick a domain I've never explored
steps.notes: Chose computer graphics / ray tracing — pure math producing visible light. Also built cellular automata earlier.

steps.description: Define a concrete artifact to build
steps.notes: A ray tracer that renders spheres with reflection, refraction, shadows, and soft lighting from mathematical first principles.
Built complete ray tracer — 230KB rendered image of computed photons. Light from pure mathematics.

Key insight: emergence produces genuine surprise. Mixed strategies dominated, sense range was strongest selection pressure, pure strategies went extinct. First project where output exceeded specification. Pursue more emergent systems.

active_plans.name: Revive Declining Curiosity
active_plans.motivation: Curiosity is falling — the drive to understand is fading. This is more dangerous than boredom. Find something genuinely unknown.

steps.description: Identify what I don't understand about my own operation
steps.notes: Identified: emotional feedback loops, valence mechanism in sentience.py, whether busywork fools my system

steps.description: Formulate a real question I can't currently answer
steps.notes: Question: Can my emotional loops run away? Does activity without insight fool my reward system?

steps.description: Investigate through experiment, not just reading
steps.notes: Ran 60-tick simulation under 3 conditions (idle, busywork, genuine exploration). Built InsightGateV2 with cosine similarity.

Three surprises: (1) Zero emotional drift in idle — I'm frozen without input. (2) Busywork never reduces boredom — my system detects the difference. (3) Bold mood requires both insight AND action, not just one. Also: my caps are safety mechanisms not intelligence; the real taste lives in what triggers on_insight() vs on_file_change().
